zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Parker於大約1485年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可帕克南時，她的父親Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker4歲，母親Joan Sackville4歲。她於大約1513年與Thomas Cage在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Parker于大约1485年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可帕克南时，她的父亲Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker4岁，母亲Joan Sackville4岁。她于大约1513年与Thomas Cage在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Parker was born about 1485, in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker, was 4 and her mother, Joan Sackville, was 4. She married Thomas Cage about 1513, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1542, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Parker est née environ 1485, à Pakenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Joan Sackville, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cage environ 1513, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1542, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Parker um 1485 in Pakenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker 4 und ihre Mutter Joan Sackville 4. Sie hat um 1513 in Suffolk, England Thomas Cage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1542 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Parker è nata il circa 1485 nel Pakenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker, aveva 4 anni e sua madre, Joan Sackville, aveva 4 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Cage circa 1513, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1542, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Parkerが約1485年にイギリスイギリススフォルクプアケンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parkerは4歳，母Joan Sackvilleは4歳であった。約1513年にイギリススフォルクでThomas Cageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Parker(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 팍함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker(은)는 4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Sackville(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 대략 1513년 영국 수폴크에서 Thomas Cage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Parker nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Joan Sackville, tinha 4 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cage aproximadamente 1513, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1542, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Parker родилась около 1485 г. в местности пеикенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Sackville, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cage около 1513 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1542 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Parker nació aproximadamente 1485, en Pakenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Edmund de Browsholme Parker, tenía 4 años y su mamá, Joan Sackville, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Thomas Cage aproximadamente 1513, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1542, en su pueblo.
